hooks.command: cd /Users/ravijuneja/RaviJunejaDrive/Work/GIt/convoy-tracking && if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then TS=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") && git add -A && git commit -m "Auto-save: $TS" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null; fi
